title: Mahabharata: The Questions of the Yaksha
description: A water spirit tests Yudhishthira with riddles on the nature of dharma — the most philosophical passage in the Mahabharata.
introduction: A water spirit tests Yudhishthira with riddles on the nature of dharma — the most philosophical passage in the Mahabharata.

translation.text: What is heavier than earth? The mother. What is higher than heaven? The father. What is faster than wind? The mind. What is more numerous than grass? Thoughts.
